title: RapidMeta Oncology | Mirvetuximab Soravtansine for FRalpha+ Platinum-Resistant Ovarian Cancer v1.0
hero_h2: Mirvetuximab Soravtansine in Platinum-Resistant Ovarian Cancer

pico.pop: Adults with platinum-resistant high-grade serous epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer with high folate receptor alpha (FRalpha) expression (>=75% of cells with PS2+ staining), 1-3 prior lines
pico.int: Mirvetuximab soravtansine 6 mg/kg adjusted ideal body weight IV every 3 weeks (folate-receptor-alpha-targeted antibody-drug conjugate)
pico.comp: Investigator's choice chemotherapy (paclitaxel weekly, pegylated liposomal doxorubicin, or topotecan)
pico.out: Investigator-assessed progression-free survival (primary); overall survival (key secondary)
pico.subgroup: Number of prior lines (1 vs 2 vs 3), prior bevacizumab, prior PARP inhibitor

real_data_entries.name: MIRASOL
real_data_entries.group: Platinum-resistant high-FR-alpha ovarian cancer, mirvetuximab soravtansine vs investigator's choice chemo (PFS primary)

allOutcomes.title: Investigator-assessed progression-free survival (primary; HR vs IC chemo)
Confirmed objective response rate (RR vs IC chemo)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Moore KN et al. N Engl J Med 2024;391:111-120 (MIRASOL).
